返回本批次

Midnight Captain – 受午夜指挥官启发的文件管理器

Midnight Captain – A midnight commander inspired file manager

github.com 作者 duguyue100 分数 32 评论 17 2026/04/12 07:37
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 序言 Midnight Commander 一直是我最喜欢的终端文件管理器。与现代替代品相比，它功能丰富、速度快，实际上试图成为一个文件管理器。然而，有相当多的功能我从未使用过，而且我无法配置适合我的 Vim 绑定。有了 OpenCode，我终于可以制作自己的终端文件管理器了。我借用了 Midnight Commander 的主要设计概念以及 NVim-Tree 文件浏览器的一些行为。我希望你会喜欢它，至少我喜欢。由于这个项目完全是 vivi 编码的，所以我不会接受社区的 PR，但可以随意提出问题并分叉它。特征
  2. 双窗格 — 并排导航两个目录，在它们之间复制/移动 树形展开 — 展开/折叠与 l/h、nerd 字体图标内联的目录 Vim 键绑定 — j/k/h/l、gg/G、ctrl+d/ctrl+u 视觉选择 — 使用 V 选择范围，一次操作多个文件 文件操作 — 复制、剪切、粘贴、删除（需要确认）、重命名 智能创建 — 创建文件或目录（尾随 / = dir，支持嵌套路径）模糊搜索——空格在当前目录打开模糊搜索； :find 递归搜索 命令调色板 — : 打开高级用户操作的命令提示符 Goto — :goto <path>，带有实时目录列表、制表符完成和 ~ 扩展 SSH — 通过 SFTP 在远程服务器上浏览和操作：ssh user@host Nerd 字体图标 — 文件类型图标、打开/关闭文件夹字形 TokyoNight 主题 — 赏心悦目
  3. 截屏
  4. 要求
  5. 支持 Nerd Fonts 的终端（推荐：JetBrainsMono Nerd Font、FiraCode Nerd Font）macOS 或 Linux

Original Summary

  1. Preamble Midnight Commander has always been my favorite terminal file manager. It's feature-rich, fast, and actually tries to be a file manager compared to modern alternatives. However, there are quite some features that I never used, and I couldn't configure a Vim bindings that works well for me. With OpenCode, I can finally make my own terminal file manager. I borrowed the main design concepts from Midnight Commander and some behavior from NVim-Tree file explorer. I hope you would like it, at least I do. Since this project is entirely vibe-coded, so I'm not going to accept PR from the community, but feel free to open issues and fork it. Features
  2. Dual pane — navigate two directories side by side, copy/move between them Tree expand — expand/collapse directories inline with l/h, nerd font icons Vim keybindings — j/k/h/l, gg/G, ctrl+d/ctrl+u Visual selection — select ranges with V, operate on multiple files at once File operations — copy, cut, paste, delete (with confirmation), rename Smart create — a creates a file or directory (trailing / = dir, nested paths supported) Fuzzy search — space opens fuzzy search in current dir; :find searches recursively Command palette — : opens a command prompt for power-user actions Goto — :goto <path> with live directory listing, tab-complete, and ~ expansion SSH — browse and operate on remote servers over SFTP via :ssh user@host Nerd font icons — file type icons, open/closed folder glyphs TokyoNight theme — easy on the eyes
  3. Screenshot
  4. Requirements
  5. A terminal with Nerd Fonts support (recommended: JetBrainsMono Nerd Font, FiraCode Nerd Font) macOS or Linux

评论（默认中文）

konmok 2026/04/12 10:14
我认为 Vivi 编码无法实现文件管理器所需的可靠性水平。在这个领域，小错误可能会导致立即和灾难性的数据丢失。

如果您正在购买文件管理器，我建议您避免任何包含大量 LLM 生成代码的项目。也许从理论上讲，它可以像手写代码一样被彻底审查；在实践中这种情况永远不会发生。

I don't think the level of reliability necessary for a file manager is achievable with vibe coding. This is an area where small bugs can cause immediate and catastrophic data loss.

If you're shopping for a file manager, I recommend avoiding any project that incorporates a significant amount of LLM-generated code. Maybe in theory it could be reviewed as thoroughly as handwritten code; in practice that never happens.

在 HN 中查看
nprateem 2026/04/12 13:41
这不是氛围编码，而是缺乏测试
It's not the vibe coding, it's the lack of tests
在 HN 中查看
alex43578 2026/04/12 14:46
我认为人类的书面测试就是这样。如果 LLM 对故障模式 X 视而不见，它是否知道可靠地编写测试来评估 X 的行为？
And I think human written tests at that. If the LLM is blind to the failure mode X, does it know to reliably write a test to evaluate the behavior of X?
在 HN 中查看
perbu 2026/04/12 14:45
哇。实际上这里没有测试。
wow. there are actually no tests here.
在 HN 中查看
perbu 2026/04/12 14:43
我认为有趣的是，这些软件现在受到 Midnight Commander 的启发，并且是由从未使用过或体验过原始 Norton Commander 的人构建的。
I think it is interesting that these pieces of software are now being inspired by Midnight Commander and are being built by people who never worked with or experiences the original, Norton Commander.

“With opencode I can” closes tab

manbash 2026/04/12 13:15
如果您要购买文件管理器，我会推荐“yazi”，这对我来说是一种新的但实用的体验。
If you're shopping for a file manager, I'd recommend "yazi", which was a new, yet practical experience for me.

deafpolygon 2026/04/12 15:49
yazi 很棒，我已经使用它有一段时间了……与 neovim 和其他 shell 工具集成得很好。
yazi is great, I’ve had it around for a while… integrates well with neovim and other shell tools.
在 HN 中查看
nottorp 2026/04/12 15:20
> ：打开高级用户操作的命令提示符

Vibe 编码与否，这就是让我对大多数 nc/dn/mc 重新实现望而却步的原因。

如果仅通过键入命令无法进入命令行，那还有什么意义呢？

At least on this one you don't have to mouse click somewhere...

> : opens a command prompt for power-user actions

Vibe coded or not, that's what puts me off from most nc/dn/mc reimplementations.

If you can't reach the command line by just typing the command, what's the point?

At least on this one you don't have to mouse click somewhere...

daoistmonk 2026/04/12 10:12
AGENTS.md 太搞笑了！ 我喜欢穴居人模式和古典模式似乎..有趣！
The AGENTS.md is hilarious! I like the caveman mode and classical mode seems.. interesting!
在 HN 中查看
comboy 2026/04/12 12:00
有趣的是，在中文中，古典写作与简洁联系在一起。在我所知道的其他语言中，这绝对行不通。
Interesting that in Chinese, classical writing is associated with terseness. That definitely wouldn't work that way in other languages I know.

duguyue100 2026/04/12 07:37
Midnight Commander 一直是我最喜欢的终端文件管理器。与现代替代品相比，它功能丰富、速度快，实际上试图成为一个文件管理器。然而，有相当多的功能我从未使用过，而且我无法配置适合我的 Vim 绑定。

有了 OpenCode，我终于可以制作自己的终端文件管理器了。我借用了 Midnight Commander 的主要设计概念以及 NVim-Tree 文件浏览器的一些行为。

我希望你会喜欢它，至少我喜欢。由于这个项目完全是 vivi 编码的，所以我不会接受社区的 PR，但可以随意提出问题并分叉它。

Midnight Commander has always been my favorite terminal file manager. It's feature-rich, fast, and actually tries to be a file manager compared to modern alternatives. However, there are quite some features that I never used, and I couldn't configure a Vim bindings that works well for me.

With OpenCode, I can finally make my own terminal file manager. I borrowed the main design concepts from Midnight Commander and some behavior from NVim-Tree file explorer.

I hope you would like it, at least I do. Since this project is entirely vibe-coded, so I'm not going to accept PR from the community, but feel free to open issues and fork it.

在 HN 中查看
vovanidze 2026/04/12 08:47
仍然没有找到任何可以代替我的 mc 的东西。此时，2 窗格布局基本上是肌肉记忆。现代的一切都让人感觉太臃肿或太慢。 mc 很棒，但是定制绑定实在是一件令人头疼的事情。真的很喜欢这里更好的 vim 集成的想法。好奇它如何处理包含 10k 以上文件的大型目录的性能？旋转一下...
still haven't found anything that replaces mc for me. the 2-pane layout is basically muscle memory at this point. everything modern just feels way too bloated or slow. mc is great but customizing the bindings is a total headache tbh. really like the idea of better vim integration here. curious how it handles performance on large directories with 10k+ files? giving it a spin...

buster 2026/04/12 15:16
我正在使用 fman，它就像 mc 的轻量级图形替代品。
I'm using fman, which is like a lightweight graphical alternative to mc.
